info.title: Identity Management

get.description: Default operation to get a list of all available Authentications

202.description: Accepted. Returned for DELAYED requests. No payload.

head.description: Get HEAD info for Authentications. Returns all HTTP Headers but no payload, otherwise it works like HTTP GET.

200.description: Operation succeeded. No payload returned for HTTP HEAD.
